versions.version_description: Based on studio version, could be.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
The Search is Over
Survivor

Transcribed by: William Sucuahi
Email: Shakespeare382@gmail.com

Tuning: Standard
Capo: 3rd fret

All chords are relative to capo

[Intro] (Originally played on piano)

[tab]e|-(0-0)-----------------|
B|--1-1---1-0---0--------|
G|--0-0-2-----2-0-0------| x2
D|--2-2-3-----------0----|
A|--3-3-3-------3-----2--|
E|-----------------------|[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]C/F[/ch]                  ([ch]F[/ch] [ch]G[/ch])
How can I convince you, what you see is real?[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]C/F[/ch]               [ch]Esus4[/ch] [ch]E/G#[/ch]
Who am I to blame you for doubting what you feel?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]G/A[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]
I was always reaching, you were just a girl I   knew.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]Esus4[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
I took for granted the friend I have in you.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]D/E[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch] ([ch]E/G#[/ch]) [ch]D/F#[/ch]           [ch]Esus4[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
I was living for a dream, loving for a moment.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/E[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch] ([ch]E/G#[/ch]) [ch]D/F#[/ch]              [ch]Esus4[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]
Taking on the world, that was just my style.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D/E[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch] ([ch]C/E[/ch]) [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]E7/G#[/ch]
Now I look into your eyes, I can see forever.[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Amadd9[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
The search is over, you were with me all the while.[/tab]

[Instrumental]

[tab]e|-(0-0)-----------------|
B|--1-1---1-0---0--------|
G|--0-0-2-----2-0-0------|
D|--2-2-3-----------0----|
A|--3-3-3-------3-----2--|
E|-----------------------|[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]C/F[/ch]                 ([ch]F[/ch] [ch]G[/ch])
Can we last forever, will we fall apart?[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]C/F[/ch]                 [ch]Esus4[/ch] [ch]E/G#[/ch]
At times it's so uncertain, the questions of the heart.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]G/A[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]G/B[/ch]
You've followed me through changes, and patiently you'd wait,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Em7[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]Esus4[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
Till I came to  my senses through some miracle of fate.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]      [ch]D/E[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch] ([ch]E/G#[/ch]) [ch]D/F#[/ch]           [ch]Esus4[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
I was living for a dream, loving for a moment.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/E[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch] ([ch]E/G#[/ch]) [ch]D/F#[/ch]              [ch]Esus4[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]
Taking on the world, that was just my style.[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D/E[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch] ([ch]C/E[/ch]) [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]E7/G#[/ch]
Now I look into your eyes, I can see forever.[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Amadd9[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch] ([ch]Csus2[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Csus4[/ch] [ch]C[/ch])
The search is over, you were with me all the while.[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab]    [ch]G/B[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Em(7)[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
Now the   miles stretch out behind me, love that I have lost.[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G/B[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]Em(7)[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]   ([ch]F/G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch])
Broken  hearts lie victims of the game.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]            ([ch]C/G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch])
Then good luck, it finally struck like lightning from the blue.[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]               [ch]C/E[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
Every highway's leading me back to you.[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                           [ch]C/F[/ch]                 ([ch]F[/ch] [ch]G[/ch])
Now at last I hold you, now all is said and done.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]
The search has come full circle.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C/F[/ch]           [ch]Esus4[/ch] [ch]E/G#[/ch]
Our destinies are one.[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]G/A[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]G/B[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]
So if you ever loved me, show me that you give  a   damn.[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Em7[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]Esus4[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
You'll know for certain the man I really am.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]D/E[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch] ([ch]E/G#[/ch]) [ch]D/F#[/ch]           [ch]Esus4[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
I was living for a dream, loving for a moment.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/E[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch] ([ch]E/G#[/ch]) [ch]D/F#[/ch]             [ch]Esus4[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]
Taking on the world, that was just my style.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/E[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch] ([ch]C/E[/ch]) [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]Dm[/ch]          [ch]E7/G#[/ch]
Then I touched your hands, I can hear you whisper:[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Amadd9[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]F/G[/ch]
The Search is over, Love was right before my eyes.[/tab]

[Outro Instrumental]

[tab]e|-(0-0)-----------------|
B|--1-1---1-0---0--------|
G|--0-0-2-----2-0-0------| x3
D|--2-2-3-----------0----|
A|--3-3-3-------3-----2--|
E|-----------------------|[/tab]

   [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
